title: 3.95ct Lab-Grown Paraiba Halo Ring S925 JR689Y
description:
Elevate your style with the stunning beauty of this Paraíba ring, crafted in high-quality S925 sterling silver. Known for its durability and hypoallergenic properties, S925 silver ensures that this ring remains as pristine as the day you received it. The luxurious design blends the radiance of lab-grown gemstones with the timeless elegance of sterling silver.

At the heart of this ring is a captivating 10.5x8mm, 3.95-carat Oval-cut Paraíba gemstone, with a soft blue hue that evokes serenity and grace. Surrounding the center stone is a delicate halo of round-cut accent stones, which further amplify the brilliance of the Paraíba. On either side of the band, six round-cut smaller stones are set, creating a symmetrical design that adds extra sparkle. With a total weight of 3.65 grams, this ring offers a perfect balance of elegance and comfort. and is available in sizes 5 to 7.5 (standard U.S. sizing). Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

Key Features:

Lab-Grown Paraíba Center Stone: A mesmerizing 10.5x8mm, 3.95-carat pear-cut Paraíba with a serene light blue color.

Round-Cut Accent Stones: A halo of round-cut stones encircles the Paraíba gemstone, enhancing its brilliance.

Additional Small Stones: Six round-cut accent stones on each side of the band (totaling 0.4 carats) add extra sparkle and depth.

S925 Sterling Silver: Durable, hypoallergenic, and tarnish-resistant, designed for long-lasting wear.

Comfortable and Elegant: Weighs 3.65 grams, offering a luxurious yet comfortable fit.

A perfect balance of modern luxury and timeless elegance, this Paraíba ring is the ideal choice for those who seek both beauty and meaning in their jewelry.
